race.name: Tornedalen Ski Marathon
race.tagline: One hundred kilometers along the frozen Torne River — ultra skiing on the Swedish-Finnish border in the Arctic north.

vitals.aid_stations: Aid stations along the river route

climate.description: The Tornedalen valley along the Swedish-Finnish border experiences some of Scandinavia's coldest temperatures. Deep cold is the norm, with stable snow cover well into April. Flat river terrain offers little shelter from Arctic winds.
challenges: Extreme cold — temperatures can drop below -30°C
Wind exposure on the open frozen river
Limited support infrastructure in remote sections
Frostbite risk requires careful gear preparation

course.primary: 100km along the frozen Torne River on the Swedish-Finnish border. Flat to gently rolling terrain following the river valley through sub-Arctic wilderness. The sheer distance and cold make this a true ultra-endurance test.
course.surface: Groomed tracks along river and forest terrain
course.grooming: Basic grooming, river sections can be variable
features: Follows the frozen Torne River along the Swedish-Finnish border
One of Scandinavia's coldest ski marathons
Flat river terrain with vast Arctic vistas
Crosses between Sweden and Finland during the race

nordic_lab_rating.score_note: A pure ultra-endurance adventure in extreme cold. Snow reliability is perfect, but remoteness, tiny field, and minimal infrastructure keep scores modest.

history.summary: The Tornedalen Ski Marathon follows the frozen Torne River along the Swedish-Finnish border in the sub-Arctic north. At 100km, it is one of the longest ski marathons in Scandinavia and among the coldest. The Tornedalen (Torne Valley) is home to the Meänkieli-speaking Tornedalian minority, and the race traverses their traditional homeland.
notable_facts: Follows the frozen Torne River along the Swedish-Finnish border
100km makes it one of the longest ski marathons in Scandinavia
Traverses the traditional homeland of the Tornedalian minority
Temperatures regularly drop below -25°C during the race
The Torne River forms the natural border between Sweden and Finland

youtube_data.search_query: Tornedalen Ski Marathon cross country ski race Tornio River valley

videos.title: Tornedalsloppet 50-årsjubileum 2017
videos.description:
Film om Tornedalsloppets 50-års jubileum 26 mars 2017.
Film about the 50th anniversary of Tornedalsloppet March 26, 2017.
Produced, filmed and edited by Jonatan Lahti and Erik Wiippa.
Slow motion photo: Alma Lahti
Music: "Take a chance" Kevin Macloud, Royalty free music.
and "We are the champions" instrumental version, played and recorded by Jonatan Lahti
videos.curation_reason: Documentary about the Tornedalen Ski Marathon's 50th anniversary showing race coverage and historical perspective of this border region race.
